ddt:Target.Name: MG1CS180_C501_200_v1.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Author : Selvarani Marikani
Applications: X1310/BJA/HJB/XJI Engines: HR18DDh ECU:MG1CS180 Soft: C501_2XX, _______________________________________________ Reference Documents: DID (RENAULT): DID_List_C5010200(2-0) DID (SUPPLIER): MD16 DTC: EventList_C5010200(2-0) DID Master file:DCM_DID_List_xxxx(11-0) PROTOCOL :Diag ON CAN
Starting Point: MG1CS180_C501_200_v1.0
__________________________________________ History: [04-04-2022](SMA) -To respect Nomenclature of the Db , The Db is renamed as "MG1CS180_C501_200_v1.0"from MG1CS180_C501_200_v1.0Trail2
[29-03-2022] MG1CS180_C501_200_v1.0(SMA) ->Application Added -610 Generic DID update -50 Non Numeric DID updated (vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber Name Normalized to adhere the DDT Checksum error) -15 DID Numeric _RW Added -37 DID Numeric _R_Added -Common DTC, I/O, Routine Services and session , tester , integrated from AEMS reference db DID Unit normalized to remove the Builder checked error ->ns.rpm=>rpm ->Maximum negative downstream O2 sensor signal gradient (within 500msec.)->mv/ms DID Equivalent unit to remove the Builder checked error (During unit conversion , the Offset /Resololution are also modified ) ->Catalyst diagnosis criteria (OSC level)->mmol to mol ->Cumulative heat (total) received by 1st catalyst for SFD->kJ to J hkm ->no unit (Reference AEMS Db) Maximum negative downstream O2 sensor signal gradient (within 500msec.)->MV/ms to V/ms Note:Missing Info Not included Updated DTC List- wrt (EventList_C5010200(2-0)) Added Screens - THR , SOFTWARE LOCK , EGR , Air System Actuators 1 , Air System Sensors 1 , TUNING , COOLING , Vehicle Parameters , PID Homologation : Misfire ( SW >= LM38 ) , Homologation : Fuel system .

Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.
